## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Natalie Al Saad for a Managing Editor role.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Prioritizes revenue impact:** Natalie re-prioritized a bank's transactional content (driving credit card applications) over a long-term real estate client's brand-building blogs, ensuring the higher-value campaign launched on time.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Systematizes quality control:** Prevented a product launch failure by halting an Upwork freelancer's blog (which lacked keywords) and implementing a mandatory, detailed checklist for all future content.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**Drives AI adoption for results:** Convinced management to adopt ChatGPT, which increased blog traffic by 80% and is now the team's primary content creation tool.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [**Role is end-to-end content production:** The Managing Editor role, effective Dec 1, shifts from editing to full ownership of content workflows in the internal Atlas platform, with a key focus on troubleshooting and improving the platform itself.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)

## Topics

### Execution & Prioritization

  - [**Challenge:** Managing competing deadlines for a bank and a real estate client, both requiring high-volume (1500-word) blogs weekly.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [**Solution:** Assessed content intent to determine business impact.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [**Bank:** Transactional content → direct revenue (credit card applications) → **High Priority**](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
      - [**Real Estate:** Brand-building content → lower direct revenue → **Lower Priority**](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Action:** Communicated the rationale to account managers and re-prioritized the bank's content.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Outcome:** Both clients were satisfied; the bank's campaign launched on time and generated applications.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [**Tool:** A custom, shared Google Sheet for real-time tracking and delegation.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

### Content Quality & Process Improvement

  - [**Challenge:** A new product launch was at risk from an Upwork freelancer's blog that lacked keywords, making it undiscoverable.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [**Action:** Halted the launch, despite a manager's deadline, to rewrite the blog with proper keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [**Outcome:** The rewritten blog became one of the company's highest-performing pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [**Process:** Implemented a mandatory, detailed checklist for all content, covering keywords, AI usage, and other quality standards.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=571.0)

### Leadership Collaboration

  - [**Challenge:** A CEO's feedback identified Natalie was taking on too much tactical work instead of delegating to focus on managerial tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [**Action:** Immediately shifted focus to delegating all possible tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [**Outcome:** A new daily routine of prioritizing delegation to maximize managerial impact.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)

### GrowthX Context & Role Expectations

  - [**Leadership Updates:** Communicated via Slack, weekly account health meetings, and Linear (for company-wide task tracking).](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [**Managing Editor Role (Effective Dec 1):**](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
      - [**Shift:** From editing content from Content Managers to owning the end-to-end production workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
      - [**Responsibilities:** Running workflows in the internal Atlas platform, managing the Airtable content database, and communicating with Engagement Managers (client-facing).](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [**First Challenge:** Improving the Atlas platform's output.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Problem:** Some team members bypass Atlas for external tools (e.g., ChatGPT) when workflows are imperfect.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Expectation:** Proactively troubleshoot workflows and prompts to improve the core product, rather than abandoning it.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Continue the interview process.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [**Natalie:** Await next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/CYxo2GktJjMWkpgnKFhJvdEGiQ874AxS?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
